suite.name: Login Tests2 Individual

test.name: CTUI02 - Clicar em entrar com ambos os campos vazios

kw.name: Dado que o usuário está na página de login do Lake Lounge Club
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Quando ele deixa os campos de e-mail e senha em branco
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text '' into text field 'xpath=//input[@type='email' or @name='email']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text '' into text field 'xpath=//input[@type='password' or @name='senha']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: E clica no botão para entrar
Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Então o sistema deve exibir uma mensagem Email inválido
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

test.name: CTUI03 - Clicar em entrar preenchendo apenas o e-mail

kw.name: Dado que o usuário está na página de login do Lake Lounge Club
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Quando ele preenche apenas o e-mail "carlos@email.com" e deixa a senha em branco
kw.source_name: Quando ele preenche apenas o e-mail "${email}" e deixa a senha em branco

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'carlos@email.com' into text field 'xpath=//input[@type='email' or @name='email']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text '' into text field 'xpath=//input[@type='password' or @name='senha']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: E clica no botão para entrar
Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Então o sistema deve exibir uma mensagem Senha inválida
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

test.name: CTUI04 - Clicar em entrar preenchendo apenas a senha

kw.name: Dado que o usuário está na página de login do Lake Lounge Club
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Quando ele deixa o e-mail em branco e preenche apenas a senha "123"
kw.source_name: Quando ele deixa o e-mail em branco e preenche apenas a senha "${senha}"

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text '' into text field 'xpath=//input[@type='email' or @name='email']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text '123' into text field 'xpath=//input[@type='password' or @name='senha']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: E clica no botão para entrar
Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Então o sistema deve exibir uma mensagem Email inválido
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

suite.doc: Script Individual de Testes de Interface (UI) para a Tela de Login do Lake Lounge Club.
